/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_strang_validation.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_strang_validation.dir/test_strang_validation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_strang_validation.dir/src/ConservativeSolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_strang_validation.dir/src/Dirac3D.cpp.o -o bin/test_strang_validation  /lib/libvulkan.so -lpthread -lm -lfftw3f /usr/lib/libgomp.so /usr/lib/libpthread.a
